title: chaenomeles × superba
intro: Chaenomeles × superba, also known as the flowering quince or Japanese quince, is a hybrid shrub that belongs to the rose family, characterized by its vibrant flowers and thorny branches. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Chaenomeles × superba include its ability to reduce fever, relieve digestive issues, and provide antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers, leaves, and bark can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
